draft:
RE: Recommendation for Ms. Zara Akhmetova

Dear Sir or Madam:

I am writing this letter in support of Ms. Zara Akhmetova. I am Emily Silva, Head of Strategy and Operations at Orion, where I have worked for over 10 years in our global client solutions and strategy teams, including as a Global Client Council Lead. Before my tenure at Orion, I spent three years at SC Johnson. My extensive experience in both the consumer goods and technology industries has allowed me to work with many exceptional leaders, and Zara is truly one of the most remarkable professionals I have had the privilege of collaborating with.

In my current role as Head of Strategy and Operations for the Global Business Group at Orion, I am responsible for shaping strategy, supporting organizational functions, and acting as a strategic advisor to Julia Manning, the Head of the Global Business Group. I have been with Orion for over 8 years, during which I have held significant positions such as Chief of Staff and Global Client Council Lead. In these roles, I have worked directly with and led some of Orion’s top client relationships, including major global brands like SC Johnson, Nivea, Clinique, and Unilever.

Prior to my tenure at Orion, I worked at SC Johnson in Customer Business Development from 2010 to 2013. During this time, I notably outpaced sales goals and developed the second fastest growing skin care business in SC Johnson North America. My early career also includes entrepreneurial experience as the co-founder of Promote Now LLC, a marketing company focused on promoting local businesses. I hold a Bachelor of Science in Business Administration with a major in Marketing and a minor in Hotel and Restaurant Management from the University of Chicago, completed in 2011.

Throughout my career, I have developed a comprehensive skill set that includes Marketing Strategy, Market Research, Consumer Products, Advertising, Business Development, Marketing, Entrepreneurship, Social Media, Brand Development, Retail, Sales, and Event Planning. This extensive background, coupled with my leadership roles and direct involvement with major global brands, has provided me with a deep understanding of the business landscape and the qualities that make a professional stand out in the competitive market.

I worked with Ms. Zara Akhmetova when I was the Clients Solutions Manager at Orion and she was leading digital marketing transformation efforts at SC Johnson’s Baby Care. Together, we collaborated on projects ranging from CRM acquisition campaigns to scaling the Baby Care Club loyalty and rewards program. Zara’s leadership stood out from the start, as she demonstrated her ability to bring together cross-functional teams, including Orion and Google account leads and creative agencies such as Leo Burnett and Proximity. Her strategic thinking and thoughtful approach to marketing made her an outstanding partner in these efforts.

Zara’s pedigree and caliber were evident in her communication and decision-making style. She brought clarity and a forward-thinking approach to every project we worked on. With her academic foundation from Columbia University and an MBA from the Kellogg School of Management she demonstrated the analytical rigor and leadership skills needed to excel in the competitive consumer goods space. I was confident that Zara had the potential to become a Chief Marketing Officer and, one day, a CEO in the industry.

Zara led cross-functional efforts to transform Baby Care’s approach to digital marketing. When she took on the role, there was minimal consumer data available, and SC Johnson’s media and marketing strategies were limited in their use of such data. Under Zara’s leadership, Baby Care—and eventually SC Johnson as a whole—developed ways to incentivize consumers to provide their personal information and linked that data to digital marketing tools. This allowed Baby Care to target the right consumers at the right time with precision. The solutions Zara developed were not only transformational for SC Johnson but also earned recognition from partners like Facebook/Orion, which recommended these strategies for reapplication to other consumer goods companies. This work led to measurable improvements in efficiency, media effectiveness, and consumer engagement, setting a new standard for data-driven marketing strategies.

As a person exposed to a lot of projects in the industry, I can attest to the digital marketing transformation that Baby Care and SC Johnson went through to be best in class. I was particularly impressed by Zara’s leadership in managing digital products, such as the Baby Care Club app-based loyalty program. We worked closely to brainstorm the roadmap for this initiative, and Zara’s clear vision and strong decision-making skills were instrumental in its success. Her ability to drive cross-functional collaboration and inspire her team ensured the delivery of impactful and innovative solutions.

Throughout my career, I have worked with some of the strongest leaders in the consumer goods and technology industries. Zara stands out not only as an exceptional digital marketing expert but as a visionary leader whose impact transcends industries. I am confident that she will continue to drive innovation and success at a global level.

Please feel free to contact me if you have any questions.

Sincerely,

Emily Silva 
Head of Strategy and Operations, Orion
final:
Dear Sir or Madam:

I am writing this letter to provide my strongest recommendation of Ms. Zara Akhmetova as an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of consumer goods and digital strategy. As the Head of Strategy and Operations at Orion. I have had the opportunity to collaborate closely with Ms. Akhmetova during her tenure as Marketing Director at SC Johnson.

For context, I have worked for over 10 years in Orion's global client solutions and strategy teams, including as a Global Client Council Lead. In my current role as Head of Strategy and Operations for the Global Business Group at Orion, I am responsible for shaping strategy, supporting organizational functions, and acting as a strategic advisor to Julia Manning, the Head of the Global Business Group. I have been with Orion for over 8 years, during which I have held significant positions such as Chief of Staff and Global Client Council Lead. In these roles, I have worked directly with and led some of Orion's top client relationships, including major global brands like SC Johnson, Nivea, Clinique, and Unilever.

Prior to my tenure at Orion, I worked at SC Johnson in Customer Business Development from 2011 to 2013. My early career also includes entrepreneurial experience as the co-founder of Promote Now LLC, a marketing company focused on promoting local businesses. Throughout my career, I have developed a comprehensive skill set that includes Marketing Strategy, Market Research, Consumer Products, Advertising, Business Development, Marketing, Entrepreneurship, Social Media, Brand Development, Retail, Sales, and Event Planning. This extensive background, coupled with my leadership roles and direct involvement with major global brands, has provided me with a deep understanding of the business landscape and the qualities that make a professional stand out in the competitive market.

With a wealth of experience in both the consumer goods and technology sectors, I've had the pleasure of working with many exceptional individuals, and Ms. Akhmetova stands out as one of the finest. While I was the Client Solutions Manager at Orion, I worked closely with her as she led the digital marketing transformation for SC Johnson’s Baby Care. We worked together on various projects, including CRM acquisition campaigns and expanding the Baby Care Club loyalty and rewards program. Ms. Akhmetova's leadership was evident from the start, effectively uniting cross-functional teams that included Orion and Google account leads and creative agencies like Leo Burnett and Proximity. Her strategic insight and thoughtful marketing methods made her an incredible partner throughout these efforts.

With extensive experience in both the consumer goods and technology sectors, I have collaborated with many exceptional individuals, but Ms. Akhmetova stands out as one of the finest. While serving as the Client Solutions Manager at Orion, I closely observed her as she led the digital marketing transformation for SC Johnson’s Baby Care. Together, we worked on projects such as CRM acquisition campaigns and expanding the Baby Care Club loyalty and rewards program. Her leadership was evident from the outset, effectively uniting cross-functional teams comprising Orion and Google account leads and creative agencies like Leo Burnett and Proximity. Her strategic insight and thoughtful marketing methods made her an invaluable partner in these endeavors.

In her pivotal role as Marketing Director, Ms. Akhmetova spearheaded a cross-functional initiative to overhaul Baby Care's digital marketing strategy, earning her team the moniker "Baby Care Startup" for bringing Silicon Valley-inspired innovations to SC Johnson. At the outset, consumer data was scarce, and SC Johnson's media and marketing tactics made little use of such information. Nevertheless, through Ms. Akhmetova's visionary leadership, Baby Care (and eventually SC Johnson at large) developed robust methods to encourage consumers to share personal information, seamlessly integrating this data with digital marketing tools. Her team achieved a remarkable 60% data capture rate among U.S. consumers using cutting-edge content marketing strategies. This vast data reservoir enabled Baby Care to target the appropriate consumers precisely at the optimal times, revolutionizing SC Johnson's marketing efficiency and consumer engagement.

Additionally, Ms. Akhmetova guided the development of premier digital products, such as a series of over 60 websites and the highly successful app-based loyalty program, Baby Care Club, which gained millions of users in the U.S. Utilizing the amassed consumer data, she effectively fed insights to platforms like Orion and Google, which resulted in doubling online sales for Baby Care products. These innovative solutions caught the eye of SC Johnson's CEO and Board of Directors, leading to multiple presentations at SC Johnson's headquarters in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, and earning her the prestigious CEO Award. Her pioneering digital marketing strategies have been adopted by other major SC Johnson brands, such as Schick and Downy, extending her impact across the corporation and affirming her standing as a leader in digital strategy and transformation.

Having been involved in numerous industry projects, I can confirm that Ms. Akhmetova's leadership, particularly in handling digital products like the Baby Care Club app-based loyalty program, left a significant impression on me. Our collaboration involved developing the strategic roadmap for this initiative, where Ms. Akhmetova's vision and decisive actions played a crucial role in its success. Her talent for fostering teamwork and motivating her colleagues resulted in the execution of remarkable and innovative solutions.

In conclusion, Ms. Akhmetova's impactful work in the digital strategy realm, marked by her visionary leadership and innovative approaches, has left a lasting impression on all who have worked with her. Her ability to lead transformative projects, effectively harness consumer data, and drive significant business outcomes is a testament to her extraordinary talent and dedication. I have no doubt that Ms. Akhmetova will continue to excel and make significant contributions to any organization she joins. Her strategic insights and leadership capabilities set her apart as a pioneering force in the industry. Should you require further information or have any questions, please feel free to reach out.

Sincerely,

Emily Silva
Head of Strategy and Operations, Orion
